sutta: Bhikkhus, I do not see even a single thing that changes so quickly as the mind.
commentary: The teacher highlights that the mind can change extremely fast. Use this wisely: act quickly when a good intention arises, and pause when a harmful intention (like anger) arises, because the state will change if you don't act on it.
